name: canshare-tnm-female-genital-cervix-uteri-ct
title: NZ AJCC female genital cervix uteri clinical T category
description: A clinical tumour stage (cT) of a cervix uteri tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
